title: dactylorhiza fuchsii var. sooana
intro: Dactylorhiza fuchsii var. sooana, also known as the Spotted Orchid or Northern Marsh Orchid, is a rare and protected variety of the Dactylorhiza fuchsii orchid species. It is a terrestrial orchid native to the UK and Ireland, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers with a white or yellow spot. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza fuchsii var. sooana include its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to treat urinary tract issues and can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which may also provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
